subject: Apply all taste-review fixes

subject: Create new Next.js 14 app skeleton at garam-masala-dating-app

subject: Fix all review issues
description: Fix all bugs, UX issues, content inconsistencies, and missing features identified in the review: Season IV→2026, TikTok URL, dead links, submission error state, file size validation, back link, 404 page, admin notes save on close, scroll lock, update feedback, explicit newest sort.

subject: Read all source files before editing
